records.question: What stadium named Invesco Field at Mile High has at least 8 home games, an average attendance of at least 74908, a capacity percentage exactly 98.4, and a total attendance of at most 599264?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.id FROM stadium
WHERE stadium.average_attendance >= 74908.0 AND stadium.capacity_percentage = 98.4 AND stadium.name = 'Invesco Field at Mile High' AND stadium.total_attendance <= 599264.0 AND stadium.home_games >= 8
records.pred_sql:
SELECT id 
FROM stadium 
WHERE Average_Attendance >= 74908.0 
  AND Capacity_Percentage = 98.4 
  AND name = 'Invesco Field at Mile High' 
  AND Total_Attendance <= 599264.0 
  AND Home_Games >= 8

records.question: Which stadium named Cowboys Stadium has a total attendance of exactly 696377, an average attendance of at least 87047, no more than 8 home games, and a capacity percentage exactly equal to 108.8?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.id FROM stadium
WHERE stadium.average_attendance >= 87047.0 AND stadium.home_games <= 8 AND stadium.total_attendance = 696377.0 AND stadium.capacity_percentage = 108.8 AND stadium.name = 'Cowboys Stadium'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT id
FROM stadium
WHERE Average_Attendance >= 87047.0
  AND Home_Games <= 8
  AND Total_Attendance = 696377.0
  AND Capacity_Percentage = 108.8
  AND name = 'Cowboys Stadium'

records.question: Which stadiums have a total attendance of exactly 553152.0 and hosted games in seasons at most 2012?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.id FROM stadium
JOIN game ON stadium.id = game.stadium_id
WHERE game.season <= 2012 AND stadium.total_attendance = 553152.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT stadium.id
FROM stadium
INNER JOIN game ON stadium.id = game.stadium_id
WHERE stadium.Total_Attendance = 553152.0
  AND game.Season <= 2012

records.question: What stadiums have a total attendance of at most 569817 and an average attendance of no more than 71227, where a game with an away team of Pakhtakor ended with a score of 1–2?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.id FROM stadium
JOIN game ON stadium.id = game.stadium_id
WHERE stadium.total_attendance <= 569817.0 AND game.score = '1–2' AND game.away_team = 'Pakhtakor' AND stadium.average_attendance <= 71227.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT stadium.id
FROM stadium
WHERE stadium.Total_Attendance <= 569817.0
  AND stadium.Average_Attendance <= 71227.0
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM game
    WHERE game.stadium_id = stadium.id
      AND game.Score = '1–2'
      AND game.Away_team = 'Pakhtakor'
  )

records.question: Which stadium named Cowboys Stadium has a total attendance of 696377.0, an average attendance of at least 87047.0, and hosted a League game on 21 August 2011 where Bunyodkor was home, Pakhtakor was away, and the score was 2–1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.id FROM stadium
JOIN game ON stadium.id = game.stadium_id
WHERE stadium.name = 'Cowboys Stadium' AND game.away_team = 'Pakhtakor' AND stadium.average_attendance >= 87047.0 AND game.home_team = 'Bunyodkor' AND game.date = '21 August 2011' AND game.score = '2–1' AND stadium.total_attendance = 696377.0 AND game.competition = 'League'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT stadium.id
FROM stadium
INNER JOIN game ON stadium.id = game.stadium_id
WHERE stadium.name = 'Cowboys Stadium'
  AND stadium.Average_Attendance >= 87047.0
  AND stadium.Total_Attendance = 696377.0
  AND game.Away_team = 'Pakhtakor'
  AND game.Home_team = 'Bunyodkor'
  AND game.Date = '21 August 2011'
  AND game.Score = '2–1'
  AND game.Competition = 'League'

records.question: Which stadiums have total attendance exactly 560304.0 and a capacity percentage of at most 96.0?
records.gold_sql:

records.pred_sql:
SELECT id 
FROM stadium 
WHERE Capacity_Percentage <= 96.0 
  AND Total_Attendance = 560304.0

records.question: Which stadiums hosted games on 10 July 2008 that ended with a 1–1 score and have an average attendance of at most 78596?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.id FROM stadium
JOIN game ON stadium.id = game.stadium_id
WHERE game.date = '10 July 2008' AND stadium.average_attendance <= 78596.0 AND game.score = '1–1'

SELECT DISTINCT stadium.id
FROM stadium
INNER JOIN game ON stadium.id = game.stadium_id
WHERE stadium.Average_Attendance <= 78596.0
  AND game.Date = '10 July 2008'
  AND game.Score = '1–1'

records.question: What stadium named M&T Bank Stadium has an average attendance of at least 71227, hosts at least 8 home games, and held a game on 12 July 2009 where Bunyodkor was the home team and Pakhtakor the away team in season 2009 or earlier?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.id FROM stadium
JOIN game ON stadium.id = game.stadium_id
WHERE game.away_team = 'Pakhtakor' AND stadium.name = 'M&T Bank Stadium' AND stadium.home_games >= 8 AND game.home_team = 'Bunyodkor' AND game.date = '12 July 2009' AND game.season <= 2009 AND stadium.average_attendance >= 71227.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT 
    stadium.id
FROM 
    stadium
INNER JOIN 
    game
ON 
    stadium.id = game.stadium_id
WHERE 
    stadium.name = 'M&T Bank Stadium'
    AND stadium.Home_Games >= 8
    AND stadium.Average_Attendance >= 71227.0
    AND game.Away_team = 'Pakhtakor'
    AND game.Home_team = 'Bunyodkor'
    AND game.Date = '12 July 2009'
    AND game.Season <= 2009
